pm kisan.title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
pm kisan.description: Provides ₹6,000 per year to small and marginal farmers across India
pm kisan.benefits: Three instalments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank accounts
pm kisan.eligibility: All landholding farmers with cultivable land up to 2 hectares
pm kisan.documents: Land records, Aadhaar card, Bank account details
pm kisan.how_to_apply: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre or apply on pmkisan.gov.in

ayushman bharat.title: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
ayushman bharat.description: World's largest health insurance scheme with ₹5 lakh cover per family per year
ayushman bharat.benefits: Cashless and paperless treatment at over 25,000 empanelled hospitals for 1,393 procedures
ayushman bharat.eligibility: Families listed in SECC-2011 database, poor and vulnerable rural and urban families
ayushman bharat.documents: Aadhaar card, Ration card, Income certificate
ayushman bharat.how_to_apply: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or visit your nearest Arogya Mitra kiosk

ujjwala yojana.title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
ujjwala yojana.description: Free LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line households to replace polluting fuels
ujjwala yojana.benefits: Free LPG connection with first cylinder and stove, reducing indoor air pollution
ujjwala yojana.eligibility: Women aged 18 and above from BPL households
ujjwala yojana.documents: BPL ration card, Aadhaar, Bank account, Passport-size photo
ujjwala yojana.how_to_apply: Submit application at your nearest authorized LPG dealer

mudra yojana.title: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
mudra yojana.description: Provides loans to non-corporate non-farm small and micro enterprises to facilitate growth
mudra yojana.benefits: Loans of up to ₹10 lakhs across three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishore (₹50,000 to ₹5 lakh), Tarun (₹5 lakh to ₹10 lakh)
mudra yojana.eligibility: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for non-farm income generating activities
mudra yojana.documents: Identity proof, Address proof, Business plan, Bank statements
mudra yojana.how_to_apply: Apply at any public sector bank, private sector bank, microfinance institutions, or mudra.org.in

jan dhan yojana.title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
jan dhan yojana.description: National financial inclusion mission to ensure affordable financial services to all households
jan dhan yojana.benefits: Zero balance bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹1 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life cover, overdraft facility
jan dhan yojana.eligibility: Any Indian citizen, especially those without a bank account
jan dhan yojana.documents: Aadhaar card or any government approved identity proof
jan dhan yojana.how_to_apply: Visit any bank branch or Business Correspondent near you

skill india.title: Skill India Mission
skill india.description: National initiative to enable large numbers of youth to take up industry-relevant skill training
skill india.benefits: Free skill training, certification, stipend during training, placement assistance in various sectors
skill india.eligibility: Indian youth aged 15 to 45 years looking for skill development
skill india.documents: Aadhaar card, Age proof, Educational certificates
skill india.how_to_apply: Register at skillindia.gov.in or nearest Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Kendra

startup india.title: Startup India Initiative
startup india.description: Government initiative to build a strong ecosystem for nurturing innovation and startups
startup india.benefits: 3-year income tax exemption, fast-track patent examination, self-certification under 9 labour laws, ₹10,000 crore fund of funds
startup india.eligibility: Entity incorporated for less than 10 years, annual turnover under ₹100 crore, working towards innovation
startup india.documents: Incorporation certificate, PAN, Bank account details, Business pitch

stand up india.title: Stand Up India Scheme
stand up india.description: Facilitates bank loans to SC, ST and women entrepreneurs for greenfield enterprises
stand up india.benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for manufacturing, services, or trading sector
stand up india.eligibility: SC, ST borrowers and women entrepreneurs aged 18 years and above
stand up india.documents: Identity proof, Caste certificate if applicable, Business plan, Bank account
stand up india.how_to_apply: Apply at standupmitra.in or approach any scheduled commercial bank

swachh bharat.title: Swachh Bharat Mission
swachh bharat.description: National cleanliness campaign to achieve an Open Defecation Free India and improve solid waste management
swachh bharat.benefits: Subsidy for construction of individual household toilets, waste processing plants in rural and urban areas
swachh bharat.eligibility: All households in rural areas without a toilet, urban local bodies for solid waste management
swachh bharat.documents: Aadhaar card, Bank account, Land proof for toilet construction
swachh bharat.how_to_apply: Apply through your Gram Panchayat in rural areas or municipal body in urban areas

national health mission.title: National Health Mission
national health mission.description: Comprehensive government program to strengthen healthcare delivery and infrastructure across India
national health mission.benefits: Free essential medicines, free diagnostics, free dialysis, free treatment for serious diseases, ambulance services
national health mission.eligibility: All Indian citizens, prioritizing rural, tribal, and urban poor populations
national health mission.documents: Aadhaar for linking benefits, no documents required for most services
national health mission.how_to_apply: Access services at any government health centre, PHC, CHC, or district hospital

pm fasal bima.title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
pm fasal bima.description: Crop insurance scheme to provide financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities
pm fasal bima.benefits: Insurance coverage and financial support for crop failure due to non-preventable risks
pm fasal bima.eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas
pm fasal bima.documents: Bank account, Land records, Sowing certificate, Aadhaar
pm fasal bima.how_to_apply: Apply through banks, insurance companies, or the PMFBY portal

e shram.title: E-Shram Portal
e shram.description: National database of unorganised workers including migrant workers, construction workers, and gig workers
e shram.benefits: ₹2 lakh accidental insurance cover, links to social security benefits, priority in social schemes
e shram.eligibility: Unorganised workers aged 16 to 59 years who are not EPFO or ESIC members
e shram.documents: Aadhaar card, Mobile number linked to Aadhaar, Bank account
e shram.how_to_apply: Self-register at eshram.gov.in or nearest Common Service Centre

paracetamol.title: Paracetamol (Acetaminophen)
paracetamol.uses: Relief of mild to moderate fever, headache, toothache, muscle pain, and body ache
paracetamol.dosage: Adults: 500mg to 1000mg every 4 to 6 hours, maximum 4000mg per day. Children: 10 to 15mg per kg every 4 to 6 hours
paracetamol.warning: Do not exceed the recommended dose. Avoid alcohol. Consult doctor if symptoms persist beyond 3 days.
paracetamol.side_effects: Rare at recommended doses; overdose can cause severe liver damage

dolo.title: Dolo 650
dolo.uses: Fever, headache, body ache, toothache, and cold-related symptoms
dolo.dosage: Adults: 1 tablet (650mg) every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Do not exceed 4 tablets in 24 hours.
dolo.warning: Not recommended for sustained use without doctor's advice. Keep out of reach of children.
dolo.side_effects: Nausea, stomach discomfort; rare cases of allergic rash

amoxicillin.title: Amoxicillin
amoxicillin.uses: Treatment of bacterial infections including chest infections, ear infections, and urinary tract infections
amoxicillin.dosage: Adults: 250mg to 500mg three times daily. Children: based on body weight, as per doctor's prescription.
amoxicillin.warning: Complete the full course even if you feel better. Not effective against viral infections.
amoxicillin.side_effects: Diarrhea, nausea, rash; allergic reactions in penicillin-sensitive individuals

azithromycin.title: Azithromycin
azithromycin.uses: Bacterial infections including chest infections, throat infections, skin infections, and sexually transmitted infections
azithromycin.dosage: Adults: 500mg once daily for 3 days or as prescribed. Children: as per doctor's prescription based on weight.
azithromycin.warning: Inform your doctor of any heart conditions before use. Avoid antacids within 2 hours of taking this medicine.
azithromycin.side_effects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain, and rarely heart rhythm changes

cetirizine.title: Cetirizine
cetirizine.uses: Relief of allergy symptoms including hay fever, runny nose, sneezing, itchy eyes, and skin rashes
cetirizine.dosage: Adults and children over 6 years: 10mg once daily. Children 2 to 6 years: 5mg once daily.
cetirizine.warning: May cause drowsiness. Avoid driving or operating heavy machinery. Avoid alcohol.
cetirizine.side_effects: Drowsiness, dry mouth, headache, and fatigue

metformin.title: Metformin
metformin.uses: Management of Type 2 diabetes mellitus to control blood sugar levels
metformin.dosage: Adults: initially 500mg twice daily with meals, increased gradually to 1000mg twice daily as advised by doctor.
metformin.warning: Do not take if you have kidney disease or are about to have surgery. Consult doctor regularly for kidney function monitoring.
metformin.side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, stomach upset especially when starting; very rarely lactic acidosis

atorvastatin.title: Atorvastatin
atorvastatin.uses: Lowering cholesterol and reducing risk of heart attack, stroke, and cardiovascular disease
atorvastatin.dosage: Adults: 10mg to 80mg once daily in the evening as prescribed by doctor.
atorvastatin.warning: Inform doctor of any muscle pain or weakness. Avoid grapefruit juice. Regular blood tests for liver function required.
atorvastatin.side_effects: Muscle pain, weakness, nausea, and rarely liver enzyme elevation

losartan.title: Losartan
losartan.uses: Treatment of high blood pressure (hypertension) and protection of kidneys in diabetic patients
losartan.dosage: Adults: 50mg once daily, may be increased to 100mg once daily by doctor.
losartan.warning: Do not use during pregnancy. Monitor blood pressure and kidney function regularly.
losartan.side_effects: Dizziness, low blood pressure, elevated potassium levels, and back pain

pantoprazole.title: Pantoprazole
pantoprazole.uses: Treatment of acidity, gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD), stomach ulcers, and excess stomach acid
pantoprazole.dosage: Adults: 40mg once or twice daily before meals as prescribed. Usually taken for 4 to 8 weeks.
pantoprazole.warning: Long-term use may reduce magnesium levels and affect bone density. Do not crush or chew.
pantoprazole.side_effects: Headache, diarrhea, nausea, and stomach pain

ondansetron.title: Ondansetron
ondansetron.uses: Prevention and treatment of nausea and vomiting caused by chemotherapy, radiation therapy, or surgery
ondansetron.dosage: Adults: 8mg two to three times daily. Children: dose based on weight and age, as per doctor's advice.
ondansetron.warning: Inform doctor of any heart problems. Avoid if allergic to similar medicines.
ondansetron.side_effects: Headache, constipation, dizziness, and rarely abnormal heart rhythm

ibuprofen.title: Ibuprofen
ibuprofen.uses: Pain relief for headaches, toothaches, menstrual cramps, arthritis, and fever reduction
ibuprofen.dosage: Adults: 200mg to 400mg every 4 to 6 hours as needed. Maximum 1200mg per day without prescription.
ibuprofen.warning: Take with food to avoid stomach upset. Not recommended for long-term use without medical supervision.
ibuprofen.side_effects: Stomach pain, nausea, heartburn, and risk of gastrointestinal bleeding with prolonged use

omeprazole.title: Omeprazole
omeprazole.uses: Treatment of heartburn, stomach ulcers, GERD, and Helicobacter pylori infection when combined with antibiotics
omeprazole.dosage: Adults: 20mg once daily before breakfast for 4 weeks. For ulcers: 20mg twice daily for 4 to 8 weeks.
omeprazole.warning: Long-term use may increase risk of certain infections. Report any blood in stool or vomit to doctor.
omeprazole.side_effects: Headache, nausea, diarrhea, and vitamin B12 deficiency with long-term use

drishti.title: Drishti AI Visual Assistant
drishti.description: An AI-powered visual assistant designed to empower visually impaired users with real-time environmental awareness
drishti.features: Offline object detection using COCO-SSD, real-time path guidance using YOLOv8 and MiDaS, face recognition using face-api.js, continuous voice commands, RAG knowledge base for government schemes and medicines
drishti.team: Built by Rishi and team, Discrete Syndicates
drishti.tech: React, TypeScript, Node.js, Gemini AI, YOLOv8, MiDaS, TensorFlow.js, Web Speech API

blast disease.title: Rice Blast Disease
blast disease.description: Fungal disease caused by Magnaporthe oryzae that affects rice crops in India
blast disease.benefits: Early detection saves up to 50% of crop yield
blast disease.how_to_apply: Apply Tricyclazole fungicide at first sign of infection. Practice crop rotation and use resistant varieties.

organic farming.title: Organic Farming Tips
organic farming.description: Sustainable farming practice using natural inputs instead of chemical fertilizers and pesticides
organic farming.benefits: Healthier produce, premium market prices, lower input costs over time, and soil health improvement
organic farming.eligibility: Any farmer can adopt organic practices
organic farming.documents: PGS India certification for marketing as organic produce
organic farming.how_to_apply: Contact your local Krishi Vigyan Kendra or State Agriculture Department for training

nrega.title: MGNREGA - Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
nrega.description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work
nrega.benefits: Minimum 100 days of guaranteed employment at statutory minimum wages per household per year
nrega.eligibility: Adult members of any rural household willing to do unskilled manual work
nrega.documents: Job Card from Gram Panchayat, Aadhaar card, Bank or post office account
nrega.how_to_apply: Register at your local Gram Panchayat office to get a Job Card
